hero.tagline: The ERP built for growing businesses
hero.sub: Manage sales, inventory, HR, and finance — in Arabic and English — from one platform built for the GCC.

languages.title: Built for every team in the GCC
languages.sub: Switch between languages instantly — your data stays the same.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: All prices in Omani Rial (OMR). 20% discount on annual plans.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for freelancers and small teams

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing businesses that need more

sales.title: Sales & CRM
sales.desc: Quotes, invoices, client pipeline, and follow-ups.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.desc: Track stock, locations, and reorder levels in real time.

hr.title: HR & Payroll
hr.desc: Attendance, leave, payroll, and employee portal.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.desc: Double-entry ledger, bank reconciliation, VAT returns.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.desc: Bill of materials, work orders, and production planning.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.desc: P&L, cash flow, aged receivables, and custom dashboards.

trust.title: Built in the GCC, for the GCC and beyond
trust.sub: We understand the local regulatory environment, Arabic business culture, and the challenges of running an SME in Oman, Bahrain, and the UAE.

footer.tagline: The ERP for growing GCC businesses.
